sections.label: Technique
sections.placeholder: Multiplanar, multisequence MRI of the brain without intravenous gadolinium. State field strength, sequences, and any diffusion/dynamic series.

sections.label: Comparison
sections.placeholder: Date and type of relevant prior imaging, if available.

sections.label: Findings
sections.placeholder:
Acute infarct — DWI restriction with corresponding low ADC (true restriction, not T2 shine-through); vascular territory (ICA / MCA M1–M2 / ACA / PCA / vertebrobasilar / lacunar) and laterality; estimated volume: 
ASPECTS (0–10 MCA territory; lower = larger established core): 
Haemorrhage / microbleeds (GRE/SWI): 
Large-vessel occlusion / susceptibility (hyperdense) vessel sign: 
Chronic ischaemic change / prior infarct: 
Midline shift / mass effect / herniation: 
Grey–white differentiation:

sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise, prioritised bullets. State presence/absence of acute infarct (DWI-positive / ADC-low), its vascular territory and laterality, and — for MCA-territory ischaemia — the ASPECTS (0–10). Explicitly state presence/absence of intracranial haemorrhage and any large-vessel occlusion, and flag mass effect / midline shift / herniation as time-critical. Recommendation drawn from approved follow-up.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.placeholder: Evidence-based follow-up or correlation, drawn from approved phrasing, only if indicated.
